producer_note: Single malt Scotch distillery in Dufftown, Speyside, founded 1886 by William Grant. World's best-selling single malt.
Single malt Scotch distillery in Dufftown, Speyside, founded 1892 by William Grant & Sons, next to Glenfiddich.
Japanese spirits group operating multiple whisky distilleries (Yamazaki in Osaka, Hakushu in Yamanashi, Chita in Aichi).
Blended Scotch whisky brand owned by Diageo, blended from malt and grain whiskies sourced across multiple Scottish regions.
Largest Cognac producer, founded 1765 in Cognac. Blends eaux-de-vie sourced from across all six Cognac crus.
Single malt Scotch distillery on Easter Elchies estate at Craigellachie, Speyside, founded 1824.
Cognac house using only Fine Champagne (blend of Grande and Petite Champagne crus, min 50% Grande). Sources from both crus.
Premium tequila crafted from blue Weber agave grown in Los Altos de Jalisco (Highlands of Jalisco).
Highland single malt distillery near Crieff, Perthshire; one of Scotland's oldest working distilleries.
Cuban premium cigar brand using tobacco from the Vuelta Abajo region of Pinar del Rio.
Single malt Scotch distillery on Islay, on the shore of Loch Indaal, founded 1881.
Family-run Bas-Armagnac producer at Chateau de Bordeneuve, owned by the Guasch family.
Single-estate rum produced in Chichigalpa at the foot of the San Cristobal volcano, Nicaragua, since 1890.
Cognac producer based in Verrieres, Grande Champagne 1er Cru, distilling exclusively from Grande Champagne grapes.
Single malt Scotch distillery in Kirkwall, Orkney; classified as an Island distillery (Highland category).
Premium junmai daiginjo sake produced solely by Asahi Shuzo brewery in Iwakuni, Yamaguchi Prefecture.
Single malt Scotch distillery in Rothes, Speyside, founded 1879.
Single-vineyard Bas-Armagnac estate at Labastide d'Armagnac, owned by the Laberdolive family.
Cuban cigar brand sourcing tobacco from the Vuelta Abajo region of Pinar del Rio.
Single malt whisky distillery in Yuanshan Township, Yilan County; Taiwan's first dedicated whisky distillery, founded 2005.
Sake brand by Regis Camus blending sake from multiple Japanese breweries (Asahi Shuzo Yamaguchi, Urakasumi Miyagi, Konishi Hyogo).
Cognac house specialising in Grande Champagne 1er Cru eaux-de-vie, founded 1767.
Single malt Scotch distillery on the south coast of Islay, founded 1815.
Burgundy estate based in Chassagne-Montrachet (Cote de Beaune), founded 2004 from Domaine Colin-Deleger split.
Single malt Scotch distillery on Loch Indaal, Islay; one of the oldest licensed distilleries in Scotland (1779).
Independent blender founded 2000 by John Glaser, sourcing malt and grain whiskies from many Scottish distilleries; blending house in London.
Family-owned single malt distillery in Ballindalloch, Speyside, run by the Grant family since 1865.
Cognac house in Jarnac focusing exclusively on Grande Champagne cognac, founded 1763 by Thomas Hine.
Cuban cigar brand using Vuelta Abajo tobacco from Pinar del Rio.
Japanese whisky brand from Matsui Shuzo's Kurayoshi Distillery in Tottori Prefecture; distillation began 2017.
Single malt Scotch distillery at Lochranza on the Isle of Arran (Islands sub-region of Highland), founded 1995.
Premium vodka distilled in Cognac region (Gensac-la-Pallue) from French winter wheat; a Bacardi brand.
Sake institute and brewery in Komatsu City, Ishikawa Prefecture, founded 2017 by master toji Noguchi Naohiko.
Blended Scotch whisky brand owned by Bacardi; blended from malt and grain whiskies across multiple Scottish distilleries.
Cuban cigar brand using Vuelta Abajo tobacco from Pinar del Rio; founded 1845.
Aged tequila by Enrique Fonseca; estate-grown agave from the Highlands of Jalisco, distilled at Tequilena (NOM 1146).
Tuscan winery based in Fiesole, Florence; produces Toscana IGT wines including Testamatta and Colore from Sangiovese.
Single malt Scotch distillery near Aberlour, Speyside, founded 1967; independent since 2017 under Billy Walker.
Cuban cigar brand using Vuelta Abajo tobacco from Pinar del Rio; founded 1844.
Blended Scotch whisky by Chivas Brothers (Pernod Ricard); blended from many Scottish distilleries with Speyside malts at the core.
Single malt Scotch distillery in the Glenlivet estate, Speyside, founded 1965; owned by Angus Dundee.
Polish rye vodka distilled at Polmos Zyrardow in Mazowieckie voivodeship; uses Dankowskie rye and water from its own well.
Swedish vodka distilled and bottled exclusively in Ahus, Skane, southern Sweden, since 1879.
Independent blender (Crucial Drinks) creating blended malts that recreate flavour profiles of closed Scottish distilleries; uses 5-10 single malts per blend.
Tequila distillery at Casa Herradura in Amatitan, Jalisco (Tequila Valley/Lowlands); founded 1870.
Single malt Scotch distillery in Tain, Ross-shire (Northern Highlands), founded 1843; tallest stills in Scotland.
Boutique Napa Valley winery by Bob Levy and Martha McClellan; estate vineyard in Calistoga AVA above town.
Tequila produced in Amatitan, Jalisco (Tequila Valley/Lowlands); 100% Tequilana Weber agave from the Lowlands.
Premium junmai sake produced exclusively by Katoukichibee Shouten brewery in Sabae City, Fukui Prefecture, since 1860.
Premium cachaca produced in Patrocinio Paulista, Sao Paulo state; created 2004, owned by Campari Group since 2011.
Cuban cigar brand (Bolivar) using Vuelta Abajo tobacco from Pinar del Rio.
Sake brewery (Daimon Shuzo) in Katano City, Osaka Prefecture; founded 1826.
Independent bottler under Atom Brands releasing single-cask whiskies from many distilleries across Scotland and beyond; founded 2012.
Scottish craft brewery and distillery headquartered in Ellon, Aberdeenshire; founded 2007.
Single malt Scotch distillery at Dumgoyne north of Glasgow, on the Highland-Lowland border.
Cognac house producing exclusively Grande Champagne cognacs from estate vineyards at Logis d'Angeac.
Irish whiskey distillery in Bushmills village, County Antrim, Northern Ireland; licensed 1608.
Single-estate rum distillery in the Nassau Valley, Saint Elizabeth Parish, Jamaica; oldest continuously operating distillery in Jamaica (1749).
Hunter Laing's flagship single-cask independent bottling range; sources casks from distilleries across all Scottish regions.
Japanese whisky producer operating Yoichi (Hokkaido) and Miyagikyo (Miyagi) distilleries plus Nishinomiya grain plant.
Tennessee whiskey distilled at Lynchburg, Moore County, Tennessee; charcoal mellowed (Lincoln County Process). Founded 1866.
Family grappa distillery in Percoto/Pavia di Udine, Friuli-Venezia Giulia; founded 1897, pioneers of single-varietal grappa.
Premium blended Scotch whisky by Chivas Brothers; blended from malt and grain whiskies across multiple Scottish regions.
Tequila by Casa Cuervo distilled at La Rojena (Tequila, Jalisco) using agave from the Highlands of Jalisco.
Sake brand by Nakashima Sake Brewery in Mizunami, Gifu Prefecture; brewery founded 1702, brand launched 2001.
Sake by Yamanashi Meijo brewery in the Hakushu area of Yamanashi Prefecture; founded 1750.
Cuban cigar brand using Vuelta Abajo tobacco from Pinar del Rio; one of the oldest Habanos brands (1840).
Single malt Scotch from Speyside Distillery (Speyside Distillers Co.) at Tromie Mills, Kingussie; established 1990.
Kendall Jenner's tequila brand explicitly blending agave from both Highland and Lowland Jalisco farms.
Tequila produced at Hacienda Patron in Atotonilco el Alto in the Highlands of Jalisco.
Single malt Scotch distillery in Campbeltown on the Kintyre peninsula; founded 1832, one of three remaining Campbeltown distilleries.
Lowland single malt Scotch distillery near Clydebank, Glasgow; uses triple distillation. Founded 1823.
Sake brand by Miyasaka Brewing Company in Nagano Prefecture (Suwa and Fujimi breweries); brewing since 1662.
Premium sake brand founded 2018 by Ryuji Ikoma; blends sake produced in collaboration with multiple breweries across Yamagata, Nara and others.
Single malt Scotch distillery near Forgue, Aberdeenshire; classified as Highland though geographically on Speyside fringe. Sherry-cask focused.
Rum produced by Destilerias Unidas (DUSA) in La Miel, Lara state, near Barquisimeto at the foot of the Andes.
Cognac house founded 1926 by Norwegian Jens Reidar Larsen; blends from across Cognac AOC including Fins Bois, not exclusive to Champagne crus.
